---
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Where donors live

How far do Hubbard Hall's donors live from the hall? Distances are straight-line (haversine) from
the venue (25 E Main St, Cambridge NY) to each donor household, bucketed into half-open mile bands.
Donors whose only address is a PO box are placed at their ZIP's centroid and flagged "approximate"
(excluded from the tight 1-mile count so it stays honest).

```{python}
#| label: setup-geo
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
from hh.io import read_parquet
from hh.viz import style, BLUE, money, pct

households = read_parquet("processed", "households_summary.parquet")
donors = households[households["is_donor"]]
by_band = (
    donors.groupby("distance_band", observed=True)
    .agg(
        households=("id", "count"),
        dollars=("total_donations", "sum"),
        mean_gift=("total_donations", "mean"),
    )
    .reset_index()
)
by_band["share"] = by_band["dollars"] / by_band["dollars"].sum()
by_band["cum_share"] = by_band["dollars"].cumsum() / by_band["dollars"].sum()
by_band.style.format(
    {"dollars": money, "mean_gift": money, "share": pct, "cum_share": pct}
)
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-dollars-band
#| fig-cap: "Donated dollars by distance band (miles)"
fig = px.bar(by_band, x="distance_band", y="dollars", color_discrete_sequence=[BLUE])
fig.update_layout(
    showlegend=False,
    xaxis_title="Distance from Hubbard Hall (miles)",
    yaxis_title="Donated $",
)
fig.update_yaxes(tickprefix="$", tickformat=",.0f")
fig.update_traces(hovertemplate="$%{y:,.0f}<extra></extra>")
style(fig).show()
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-households-band
#| fig-cap: "Donor households by distance band (miles)"
fig = px.bar(by_band, x="distance_band", y="households", color_discrete_sequence=[BLUE])
fig.update_layout(
    showlegend=False,
    xaxis_title="Distance from Hubbard Hall (miles)",
    yaxis_title="Donor households",
)
fig.update_traces(hovertemplate="%{y:,.0f} households<extra></extra>")
style(fig).show()
```

```{python}
#| label: fig-avg-donation-band
#| fig-cap: "Average donation per donor household by distance band (miles)"
fig = px.bar(by_band, x="distance_band", y="mean_gift", color_discrete_sequence=[BLUE])
fig.update_layout(
    showlegend=False,
    xaxis_title="Distance from Hubbard Hall (miles)",
    yaxis_title="Average donation per household",
)
fig.update_yaxes(tickprefix="$", tickformat=",.0f")
fig.update_traces(hovertemplate="$%{y:,.0f}<extra></extra>")
style(fig).show()
```

The tightest band includes some approximate (ZIP-centroid) placements — its centroid share, to read
the 1-mile count in context:

```{python}
#| label: precision-by-band
prec = (
    donors.groupby("distance_band", observed=True)["geo_precision"]
    .apply(lambda s: (s == "centroid").mean())
    .to_frame("centroid_share")
)
prec.style.format({"centroid_share": pct})
```
